Index.title: Learn faster with <highlight>your custom AI tutor</highlight>
Index.description: Upload your math, physics or coding courses. Our platform generates adaptive quizzes and mental maps to validate your knowledge step by step.

features.title: Supercharge your STEM learning
features.subtitle: Everything you need to master complex subjects in record time.
features.feat1Desc: Your long document is segmented into digestible micro-modules by our AI to prevent cognitive overload.
features.feat2Desc: Stuck on a concept? The AI generates a new explanation and a targeted quiz before letting you move forward.
features.feat3Desc: Visualize links between complex science concepts with dynamically generated graphs.

how.title: From raw notes to mastery in 3 steps
how.step1Desc: Drop your PDF, Word doc, or raw text.
how.step2Desc: Our engine extracts key concepts and creates a learning path.
how.step3Desc: Take adaptive quizzes and progress at your own pace.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for trying out the platform.
pricing.proDesc: For serious students who want to accelerate.

Auth.socialProof: Over 10,000 students have doubled their learning speed with our adaptive loop.
